title: INTRODUCING ZAMBOS GARLIC PARMESAN — YOUR NEW FAVORITE FLAVOR
summary: Our newest flavor combines the richness of parmesan with a bold garlic kick. Available now at stores nationwide.
content_intro: We're thrilled to announce the launch of Zambos Garlic Parmesan — a flavor crafted for snack lovers who crave something bold and savory.
quote: The perfect combination of garlic and parmesan delivers a taste experience unlike any other plantain chip.
content_after_quote: Find Zambos Garlic Parmesan at your nearest retailer or order online through Amazon. Your taste buds will thank you!
